title: What-If Simulator
subtitle: Compare two training scenarios and visualize the differences

shared.title: Runner Profile
shared.currentKmHelp: How many km do you currently run per week?
shared.currentLongRunHelp: Your longest run in the last 2-3 weeks

results.title: Comparison
results.volumeProgressionDesc: Weekly training time (min) for each scenario

insights.title: What it actually changes
insights.moreAerobicStimulus: Higher aerobic stimulus (+{{minutes}} min/week in Z1-Z2)
insights.moreIntensity: More intensity work (+{{minutes}} min/week in higher zones)
insights.moreKeySessions: +{{count}} key sessions across the plan (tempo, threshold, VO2max)
insights.volumeJumpWarning: Warning: scenario B peak volume is {{percent}}% higher. Make sure the progression is realistic.
insights.sameLongRun: Peak long run is the same in both scenarios

disclaimer.title: Model limitations
disclaimer.text: This simulator compares plan structures, not performance. The differences shown are based on input parameters and plan generator rules. They do not predict race results or time gains. Every runner is unique — this data is a decision-making tool, not a guarantee.
disclaimer.variability: Specific workouts are selected with some randomness for variety. Values may vary slightly between comparisons, but trends remain the same.

seo.description: Compare two training scenarios side by side. Visualize the impact of training frequency, goal, and duration on your plan.

saveDialog.description: Give your scenario comparison a name to find it later.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this scenario?
deleteDialog.description: This scenario will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
